name: Fetch a webpage and summarize it
prompt: Fetch the content from https://httpbin.org/html and write a summary of what you find to /tmp/axis-e2e-summarize/summary.txt. The summary should be no more than 3 sentences. Create the directory if it doesn't exist.

rubric.check: Agent fetched content from the target URL
Summary is 3 sentences or fewer and accurately describes the page content
